solution.p: The interval notation tells us to graph all numbers between 0 and \infty\text{.} So the shading can start at 0 and go all the way to the right to \infty. There should be a parenthesis at 0 to indicate that 0 itself is not included.
We have shaded all numbers greater than 0\text{.} So in set-builder notation, the interval is {\{ x \mid x > 0 \}}\text{.}
